missingness: No production corpus, curator labels, or real patient/veterinary records included.
revision_reason: Prevent cohort, site, species, assay, or model-level signals from being promoted as individual cure or diagnosis claims.
claim_text: A longitudinal cohort-level trajectory claim may enter discovery memory only when the cohort boundary, modality, missingness, and endpoint are explicit.

cross_level_promotion.validation_required: Same-level cohort packet still requires independent curator review before production use.

falsification_route: Falsify or fail this gate if reviewers find cohort-level wording still supports individual diagnosis, treatment, or cure inference.
next_executable_action: Run the validator and add one curator-rated production-candidate packet when a public-safe corpus exists.
